Discover Shadow's key
features and innovations :

Concentrated Liquidity

Maximize returns by targeting the active liquidity range. Fine-tune price ranges to capture the most trading fees.

x(3,3) Incentives

Earn fees, vote incentives, and rebases from user and emission exits—all in one powerful system.

Smart Fee Architecture

Fees algorithmically adjust to match market activity, with customizable fee splits for each gauge and creator fees.
